- In-Game Upgrades: Purchased during a run using Space Nuggets (5 tiers max)
- Meta Shop Upgrades: Persistent upgrades that carry over between runs (10 tiers max)
- Tiers: Progressive improvements to the upgrade
These upgrades are purchased during gameplay and reset each run. They have
5 tiers of progression and are organized by category.

column1: - In-Game: Focus on survival to earn more nuggets
1. Homing Missiles: Meta missilePrimer (2 missiles) + In-Game homing_missiles (2 missiles) = 4 missiles total
2. Static Weapons: Meta staticBlueprint + In-Game static_weapons = Multiple always-on turrets
3. Drones: Meta droneFabricator + In-Game companion_drones = Maximum drone coverage
4. Chain Lightning: Works exceptionally well with explosiveRounds and piercingRounds
5. Backstabber: Combines with speed/turbo_boost for hit-and-run tactics
6. Combo Meter: Rewards evasionBoost and secondWind for maintaining stacks
7. Reactive Shield: Synergizes with lifesteal for aggressive sustain
- speedTuning: Improves all aspects of gameplay
- Tier 1: Basic unlock or small boost
Meta Shop Upgrades: 10 Tiers (persistent between runs)
- Tier 1-3: Defined improvements with specific values
Note: Meta upgrade costs are listed as "50/100/150/200/250/300/350/400/450/500" format
representing the cumulative cost for each tier.
